transcript:
Agent: Hi, calling from Cadence on behalf of Bayside Medical, NPI 1287654321, regarding claim status. Tax ID 88-1029384. Could I have your rep ID?
Rep: Sure, this is Marcus, rep ID MC9182, BCBS provider services.
Agent: Thanks Marcus. Claim number CLM-B2938472, member Sarah Williams, member ID YYY183746902, date of service February 28 2026, billed amount one thousand eight hundred fifty dollars.
Rep: Pulling that up now. Okay, this claim was denied on March 18 2026. The denial reason is CARC code CO-45, charge exceeds fee schedule maximum allowable. The contractual obligation is four hundred fifty dollars. RARC code N130, consult plan benefit documents for information about restrictions for this service.
Agent: Understood. What is the recommended next step?
Rep: Provider can submit a corrected claim or file a formal appeal. Appeal deadline is sixty days from denial date, which would be May 17 2026. Appeals must be submitted in writing with documentation.
Agent: Got it. Was an EOB issued?
Rep: Yes, EOB number EOB-449281736 was sent April 1 2026 to the billing address.
Agent: And the claim control number for the appeal?
Rep: Internal claim control number ICN-77382910023.
Agent: Perfect. Thank you Marcus.
Rep: You're welcome, goodbye.

expectedExtraction.denialReasonText: charge exceeds fee schedule maximum allowable
